form.label: Alerts
form.description: Recent fires of Carbide alert searches. Configure actions (email, webhook, PagerDuty, ...) on the individual saved searches under Settings > Searches, reports, and alerts.

search.query: | rest /services/alerts/fired_alerts splunk_server=local count=200 | search eai:acl.app="carbide_app_for_splunk" OR savedsearch_name="Carbide -*" | eval _time = coalesce(strptime(trigger_time, "%a %b %e %H:%M:%S %Y"), now()) | sort - _time | head 100 | table _time savedsearch_name triggered_alerts severity
index=_audit sourcetype=audittrail action="alert_fired" ss_name="Carbide -*" | timechart count by ss_name

| rest /servicesNS/-/carbide_app_for_splunk/saved/searches splunk_server=local | search title="Carbide - Alert:*" | table title alert.suppress alert.suppress.period alert.suppress.fields alert.severity disabled | rename title as "alert", "alert.suppress" as "suppress", "alert.suppress.period" as "period", "alert.suppress.fields" as "by", "alert.severity" as "severity"
